title: Bitcoin ETF flows remain a useful market sentiment signal
summary: ETF inflows and outflows can help investors understand broad risk appetite, but they should be read alongside liquidity, volatility, and macro conditions.

title: Ethereum scaling activity keeps shifting to layer 2 networks
summary: Layer 2 networks can reduce transaction costs and increase throughput, while still requiring users to understand bridge and smart contract risks.

title: Solana ecosystem watchers continue tracking developer activity
summary: Developer activity, network reliability, and user demand are common signals used to evaluate high-throughput blockchain ecosystems.
